hooks.command: jq -c 'if (.tool_input.file_path // "" | test("(assets/(app\\.js|styles\\.css)|cloudflare-worker/worker\\.js)$")) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"MONOLITHIC FILE EDITED — launch bug-hunter in background (Agent tool, subagent_type=bug-hunter, run_in_background=true) to scan for regressions of the 6 documented patterns in .claude/agents/bug-hunter.md. Do this in parallel with current work, do NOT wait."}} else empty end' 2>/dev/null || true
